auth.needAccount: Need an account? Contact your administrator for an onboarding code.
auth.checkEmailLoginLink: Check your email for a login link

auth.usernameLength: Username must be between 3 and 32 characters
auth.accountCreated: Your account has been created and is now active!

auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Login here
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

auth.passwordMinLength: Must be at least 8 characters. Cannot contain &, ^, or $ characters.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been reset successfully. Redirecting to login...
auth.verificationFailedDesc: Email verification failed. Please try again.
auth.emailSentTo: We've sent a verification email to:

auth.checkSpam: Check your spam or junk folder
auth.checkEmailCorrect: Make sure you entered the correct email address
auth.waitAndCheck: Wait a few minutes and check again
auth.welcomeEmailSent: We've sent you a welcome email with important information about getting started.
auth.loginToAccountDesc: Use your username and password to access the portal.
auth.downloadCertsDesc: Once logged in, download your TAK certificates and configure your devices.

auth.pendingStep1: Your registration details are being reviewed by an administrator

auth.pendingStep4: If declined, you will be notified via email with further instructions
auth.completeProfileDesc: Please provide the following information to continue.
auth.setPasswordDesc: Please set a password for your account to continue.

dashboard.introText: This portal is designed to help you get your ATAK client setup and ready to use. If you do not have ATAK you can download it using the icons below, once you have ATAK you can download and import the profiles.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.introText: API keys allow external applications to access your API. Each key can have specific permissions and rate limits.
apiKeys.headerUsage: Use the X-API-Key header to authenticate requests.
apiKeys.copyWarning: Important: Copy this API key now. You won't be able to see it again!
apiKeys.descriptionHelp: Optional description for this API key
apiKeys.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the API key "{{name}}"?
apiKeys.regenerateConfirm: Are you sure you want to regenerate the API key "{{name}}"? The old key will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.createdSuccess: API key created successfully. Copy the key now - it will not be shown again!
apiKeys.regeneratedSuccess: API key regenerated successfully. Copy the new key now!

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.introText: The OpenTAK Onboarding Portal API allows you to programmatically manage users, roles, TAK profiles, and other resources.
apiDocs.jwtDesc: For user-authenticated requests. Obtain tokens via the login endpoint.
apiDocs.apiKeyDesc: For server-to-server integration. Create API keys in the admin panel.
apiDocs.responseDesc: All responses are returned in JSON format. Successful responses typically include the requested data:
apiDocs.errorDesc: Error responses include an error message and code:
apiDocs.rateLimitDesc: API keys have configurable rate limits (default: 1000 requests/hour). When exceeded, you'll receive a 429 Too Many Requests response.
apiDocs.authDesc: All API endpoints require authentication. You can use either JWT tokens or API keys.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Endpoints for user authentication and token management.

users.description: Manage user accounts, including creation, updates, and deletion.
